skills.name: Maximum Might Secret
skills.description: Raises the maximum level of the Maximum Might skill.

levels.description: Raises the maximum level of the Maximum Might skill.

skills.name: Focus
skills.description: Increases the fill rate for weapons with gauges and the charge rate for weapons with charge attacks.

levels.description: Increases gauge fill rate by 5% and reduces charge times by 5%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 10% and reduces charge times by 10%.
Increases gauge fill rate by 20% and reduces charge times by 15%.

skills.name: Handicraft
skills.description: Extends the weapon sharpness gauge. However, it will not increase the gauge past its maximum.

skills.name: Power Prolonger
skills.description: Allows long swords, dual blades, insect glaives, switch axes, and charge blades to stay powered up longer.

levels.description: Slightly increases the duration weapons are powered up.
Increases the duration weapons are powered up.
Greatly increases the duration weapons are powered up.

skills.name: Maximum Might
skills.description: Increases affinity as long as stamina is kept full for a period of time.

levels.description: Increases affinity by 40% as soon as the stamina gauge is full.
